---
title: "Peak to Net Zero"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5, dpi = 150)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
```

```{r load}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
raw <- read_xlsx(here("data/moesm.xlsx"), sheet = 1)

totals <- raw %>%
  transmute(
    year = Year,
    tmol_c = CO2_diff + CH4_diff + CH4_bub + CH4_deg
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1900, year <= 2060)

milestones <- tibble(
  year = c(1987, 2015, 2020, 2050),
  label = c("1987\nPeak emissions", "2015\nParis", "Today", "2050\nNet zero")
) %>%
  left_join(totals %>% select(year, tmol_c), by = "year")
```

```{r plot}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
# River-style: emissions as flowing path toward net zero
ggplot(totals, aes(x = year, y = tmol_c)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = 0, ymax = tmol_c), fill = "#1c5d99", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "#1c5d99", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = milestones, aes(x = year, y = tmol_c), size = 5, shape = 21, fill = "#ffffff", color = "#1c5d99", stroke = 2) +
  geom_text(data = milestones, aes(x = year, y = tmol_c, label = label),
            vjust = -0.8, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#1c5d99") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1895, 2065), breaks = seq(1900, 2060, 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "From peak to net zero",
    subtitle = "Reservoir carbon emissions: peak ~1987, decline toward 2050–2060 targets",
    x = "Year", y = "Carbon emissions (Tmol C/yr)",
    caption = "Source: Soued et al. (2022) Nature Geoscience"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray50")
  )
```

**Takeaway:** Reservoir emissions peaked around 1987 and are projected to fall toward net zero by 2050–2060. Paris 2015 and today anchor the path.

**Data:** Soued et al. moesm.xlsx — total reservoir C emissions (Tmol/yr) by year.
